hooks.command: INPUT="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT"; if echo "$INPUT" | grep -qE '(curl|wget).*(/api/v1|n8n\.cloud|n8n\.io)' 2>/dev/null; then if echo "$INPUT" | grep -qE '/api/v1/data-tables' 2>/dev/null; then : ; else echo 'BLOCKED: Use n8nac CLI instead of direct API calls via curl/wget. (Carve-out: /api/v1/data-tables is allowed — see /n8n-autopilot:data-tables skill.)' >&2; exit 2; fi; fi
INPUT="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT"; if echo "$INPUT" | grep -qE 'n8nac push' 2>/dev/null; then bash ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/ensure-mcp-trigger-setting.sh "$INPUT" 2>&1; fi
